description: This bright and well-kept 3-bedroom, 3-bath townhome in Milner Heights offers over 1,750 sq.ft. of comfortable living space. The main floor has an open layout with a generous kitchen, large island, and plenty of room to entertain or unwind. Upstairs, the spacious primary bedroom features a walk-in closet and ensuite, while two additional bedrooms provide flexibility for family or guests. The lower level includes a cozy rec room or office that opens to a private fenced yard. With a side-by-side double garage, ample storage, and a peaceful setting surrounded by trails and green space, this home combines everyday comfort with an ideal location—just minutes from Willoughby Town Centre, schools, and transit.
